case_title: DUMAS MICHAEL DMD VS JONES INEZ MS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,253.75 FILED BY DUMAS MICHAEL DMD AS TO DEFENDANT JONES INEZ MS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JONES INEZ MS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUMAS MICHAEL DMD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES INEZ MS. $1,253.75 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,301.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JONES INEZ MS.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JONES INEZ MS.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MS JONES, INEZ REFUSED AND RETURNED.
